description: Per-node Portworx status, network health, and storage health via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Per-node metrics from px_node_status_node_status, px_node_status_network_status, and px_node_status_storage_status. Discovery extracts node_id and node_name labels. Node status values: 1=online/healthy, 0=offline/degraded. Label names may vary between Portworx versions; discovery falls back through node_id, node, instance labels.
name: Portworx_Node_Status
